title: hieracium kalmii var. subintegrum
intro: Hieracium kalmii var. subintegrum, also known as Kalm's hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Kalm's hawkweed include the potential reduction of inflammation and the alleviation of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
